title: Bridge Essay: Brief mindfulness meditation intervention improves attentional control of athlet

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Brief, mindfulness, meditation, intervention, improves.

**Brief mindfulness meditation intervention improves attentional control of athletes in virtual reality shooting competition: Evidence from fNIRS and eye tracking.** — Psychol Sport Exerc. PMID: 37665918. DOI: 10.1016/j.psychsport.2023.102477. Attentional control is acrucial cognitive ability for sports performance. The current research aimed to investigate whether abrief (20-min) pre-competition mindfulness meditation (MM) intervention enhances athletes' attentional control during competitions and alters the activity of brain regions related to attentional control. We created avirtual reality shooting competition to compare the eye-gaze indicators and functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) parameters of 78 university athlet
